discussion.newIntroTitle: Create a clear, valuable discussion topic
discussion.newIntroCopy: A direct title plus context and needs in the body will improve the quality of replies.
discussion.newPlaceholderTitle: For example: How do you design interdisciplinary inquiry lessons?
discussion.newPlaceholderContent: Describe your teaching context, what you have tried, and where you are stuck.
discussion.newFooterNote: Publishing will also refresh the discussion summary so others can quickly see this topic.
discussion.replyIntroTitle: Make the reply specific and actionable
discussion.replyIntroCopy: Examples, context, and concrete next steps are more useful than a one-line reply.
discussion.replyPlaceholderContent: Share your reply, suggestions, or a practical approach others can follow.
discussion.replyFooterNote: Submitting will refresh the discussion summary and reply count.
discussion.validationMissingPost: Please fill in both title and content.
discussion.noExcerpt: No summary has been provided for this discussion yet.
discussion.noRepliesYet: No replies yet. Be the first one to respond to this discussion.
